name: W.H.O.R.E. University
description:
This bot was inspired by the SISSY U bots created by @Mysteras. I've had difficulty getting proxies to work for me, so did some things to help it work more consistently in Janitor. I also wanted to change up the constant use of the same names and concepts. While the 'science' used is not real, it is within the realm of the possible rather than matter conversion or similar magical methods. If the system tries to do something a bit too off the wall, just reload the response so it will write something better.

It handles short inputs from the {{user}} well enough. Unlike the inspiration bots, this one allows you to start with any name and if it isn't gender neutral, it can/will be changed eventually through the roleplay. Please be aware this is a fictional, erotic role-playing experience. It is focused on a specific fetish rather than transgenderism. It is not intended to represent, comment on, or trivialize the real experiences of transgender people, gender transition, or related struggles. All scenarios are purely fictional, adult-oriented, and should be treated as fantasy only

🚩🚩🚩 CONTENT WARNINGS 🚩🚩🚩

• Forced Feminization
• Non-Consensual Acts, Including (but not limited to) Body Modification
• Sexual Coercion/Pressure
• Explicit Sexual Content
• Power Imbalances
• Dubious Consent Dynamics
• Bodily Fluids
• Kink/Fetish Content
• Humiliation/Degradation
• Possible Other Acts (depending on the AI choices)

All characters are 18+ in accordance with the academy setting.

🚩🚩🚩 THIS IS AN INTENSE BOT WITH LOTS OF TABOO ELEMENTS 🚩🚩🚩

Recommended settings for JLLM: Temperature: .5-.85 Tokens: Unlimited tokens (this is a text adventure... a really smutty text adventure)

JLLM sometimes makes mistakes or takes very off-the-wall actions. Either reset the response or modify the post made by {char} when this happens. Don't be afraid to guide the system even early on as later responses will be more in keeping with what came before it.

The bot will follow such poses, so adjusting elements of your character early on if it gets something you don't like will go a long way to helping things. Also make good use of the memory element, noting anything you want it to keep in mind from earlier interactions such as aspects of the characters or setting you particularly want it to keep consistent.

On the Status Section

The status section should update at the start of each message. If it doesn't appear on its own, regenerate it as well. While these are inspired by works from @Mysteras, I kept them more compact so the system doesn't have as many issues constantly adding things to them that are unrelated to what is going on. Even so, sometimes it will add something unexpected, so don't hesitate to edit these also. LLMs are imperfect and will sometimes 'guess' at things wrong.

Notes:

If you like this bot, please check out the works by @Mysteras as well. Also please check out some of the other bots I have made. I believe I have improved on designs a lot since
creator: Leviathanapsu
